# IPORDISE

> IPORDISE is Morocco's premier online store for authentic luxury, niche, designer, and Arabian perfumes. Founded in 2019 and based in Tangier, Morocco.

## About
IPORDISE was founded in 2019 with the mission to make the world's finest fragrances accessible to everyone in Morocco — with full authenticity guarantees, free nationwide delivery at a flat 35 MAD, and expert fragrance guidance.

Key facts:
- 500+ authentic fragrances in stock
- 60+ prestigious brands (niche, designer, Arabian)
- 10,000+ happy customers served since 2019
- Average customer rating: 4.9/5
- Free delivery: flat 35 MAD to every city in Morocco
- 14-day return policy on unopened items
- 100% authentic — sourced from authorised distributors only

## Collections
- All Perfumes: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html
- Men's Perfumes: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=for-men
- Women's Perfumes: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=for-women
- Unisex Fragrances: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=unisex
- Niche Collection: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=niche
- Arabian Fragrances: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=arabian
- Designer Collection: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=designer
- Discovery Sets: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=discovery-sets
- Best Sellers: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=best-sellers
- New Arrivals: https://www.ipordise.com/discover.html?filter=new-in

- Unique'e Luxury (Niche Extrait de Parfum): https://www.ipordise.com/pages/unique-luxury.html
- Valentino: https://www.ipordise.com/pages/valentino.html
